'''labala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebadilla|cebadilla]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebadilla|cebadilla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| labala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbælæth|læbælæth]] || [[word:læbælæj|læbælæj]] || [[word:læbælæsh|læbælæsh]] || [[word:læbælæ|læbælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lababalath|lababalath]] || [[word:lababalaj|lababalaj]] || [[word:lababalash|lababalash]] || [[word:lababala|lababala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:labalath|labalath]] || [[word:labalaj|labalaj]] || [[word:labalash|labalash]] || [[word:labala|labala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:labaflath|labaflath]] || [[word:labaflaj|labaflaj]] || [[word:labaflash|labaflash]] || [[word:labaflaf|labaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labalatha|labalatha]] || [[word:labalaja|labalaja]] || [[word:labalasha|labalasha]] || [[word:labalaka|labalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labalath|labalath]] || [[word:labalaj|labalaj]] || [[word:labalash|labalash]] || [[word:labala|labala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labalathal|labalathal]] || [[word:labalajal|labalajal]] || [[word:labalashal|labalashal]] || [[word:labalakal|labalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labalathatha|labalathatha]] || [[word:labalajaja|labalajaja]] || [[word:labalashasha|labalashasha]] || [[word:labalaka|labalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labalathan|labalathan]] || [[word:labalajan|labalajan]] || [[word:labalashan|labalashan]] || [[word:labalakan|labalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labalathaoro|labalathaoro]] || [[word:labalajaoro|labalajaoro]] || [[word:labalashaoro|labalashaoro]] || [[word:labalakaoro|labalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
